/usr/bin/ar qc libdap_cli_server.a CMakeFiles/dap_cli_server.dir/dap_cli_server.c.o ../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_binary_tree.c.o ../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_cbuf.c.o ../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_common.c.o ../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_config.c.o ../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_crc64.c.o ../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_file_utils.c.o ../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_fnmatch.c.o ../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_json_rpc_errors.c.o ../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_list.c.o ../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_math_convert.c.o ../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_module.c.o ../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_strfuncs.c.o ../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_string.c.o ../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_time.c.o ../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/dap_tsd.c.o ../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/unix/dap_cpu_monitor.c.o ../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/unix/dap_process_manager.c.o ../../../core/CMakeFiles/dap_core.dir/src/unix/dap_process_memory.c.o ../../../io/CMakeFiles/dap_io.dir/dap_context.c.o ../../../io/CMakeFiles/dap_io.dir/dap_events.c.o ../../../io/CMakeFiles/dap_io.dir/dap_events_socket.c.o ../../../io/CMakeFiles/dap_io.dir/dap_net.c.o ../../../io/CMakeFiles/dap_io.dir/dap_proc_thread.c.o ../../../io/CMakeFiles/dap_io.dir/dap_server.c.o ../../../io/CMakeFiles/dap_io.dir/dap_timerfd.c.o ../../../io/CMakeFiles/dap_io.dir/dap_worker.c.o ../../../io/CMakeFiles/dap_io.dir/linux/dap_network_monitor.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libdap_cli_server.a
